title: Documentation-code mismatch as early warning for security violations
detail: PR #10 contained code (db_utils.py get_user_by_id) that directly violated DEC-sql-1 despite the same module's documentation explicitly warning against that exact violation. When documentation contradicts code on a security/decision topic, it signals either incomplete review or insufficient tooling to enforce the decision. Consider adding a pre-commit hook or lint rule that cross-references code against collocated documentation for known-bad patterns.
author: pr-review-agent
